transcript.text: Hello living in Boulder V-Log for February 14th of 2019 on Thursday it's 2 17 p.m. because I never got around to doing my video this morning.
Usually I do it in the morning so I guess I do it whenever now.
I'm kind of becoming diurnalized because last night I slept I got to sleep I don't know like something and then I got up at like 2 so I've been up since 2 I think.
Let's see and I'm not tired now so last time I did a video I was working on the stairs the stands for the temple I mean the theater of Flaminius I think the Circus Flaminius.

So now I'm doing the Stadium of Agonalis made by Domitian Circus it was for running races it's I think it's the second biggest venue in Rome well unless I guess the Colosseum I counted up to 52,000 and this is 52 so I guess it's the same size as the Colosseum or bigger because then you can put more people on it.
So it's like it's only a third of the sizes the Circus Maximus which is 150,000 so I'm doing the stands on it right now and as soon as I finish you know today then I'm ready for the next thing.
I think I am going to do some stands in some of the smaller theaters I see these in the baths I see these these half these.

Half moons half circles that pop out or that are in the ring room and they're shaped the same way as a theater so I think that there are many theaters so I'm going to put seats there and even you know calculate how many people are there.
So but that won't take long and then I'll go and do the houses the regionary catalogs has the numbers of houses apartment buildings cisterns and bakeries.
And so and I have different designs and temples and I have different designs for each of them to look different so that you can see them from a distance and identify which one it is.
So I've done some of the other regions already like that so I'm going to do region nine like that I noticed a lot of the area is empty so there is a lot of room to put those.

And that's kind of a fun project to do because you can choose the layout of the city you can choose where to put the houses and where to put different things filler spaces like if you want to put a park and stuff so.

So yeah that's coming next and hopefully that'll be done there's a lot though you know there's a lot you have to put in type in so but you know once and then I'll do this region nine until it's polished and then finish the buildings and region nine was the biggest the most time consuming so and then I'll just go into the other ones and pop in the houses.

And after I do that you know I'm pretty much there not how much work you know and the closer I get to finishing Rome the the more excited I get to continue you know and then I just turn into this raging bull you know and I'm not in danger of giving up so you know and having to focus on something else for a few months that I'll never finish you know because I'm still haven't finished anything on my website.

You know I'm kind of old for that 45 minutes I haven't finished anything so I think Rome and Google are throwing with the first thing that I finished so so yeah two months the birthday of Rome April 21st I think is when I'm done with that and then I'll start doing Google Earth in Boulder because I have just as good a job with Google Earth in Boulder so so anyways that's what I'm up to.

I listened to I listened to all of bead ecclesiastical history which was really interesting although I didn't finish it all I mean I didn't really pay attention all of it I need to listen to it again and then I was doing some I think other YouTube videos history so never got to sleep I think I'm going to go and hang out with my mom I might go out to lunch with my mom I haven't had a nice meal for a long time and that'd be really cool to just go out and have a nice meal you know.
There's a pizza place they make these nice oven pizzas right in front of you or I could get yeah so anyways okay that's enough talk and have a good and peace out.
